forecast-period.text: Mostly sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then turning southerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the north in the afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending southerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the eastern border in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 25 to 40 km/h during the day then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Sunny morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Sunny morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures 28 to 33.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 34.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the east in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 27 to 32.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 31.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the early afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to the low 20s with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 30s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Woomera in the afternoon. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to the low 20s with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 30s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Woomera in the morning. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 33.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 30 to 36.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the morning then tending east to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 19 and 24 with daytime temperatures reaching 31 to 37.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek in the afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 19 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 30s.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 37.
